ast.source: The thickness of the underline that highlights the current line

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How soon lines shall be faded out

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to dim paragraphs / sentences in notes / editors that your cursor is not on (e.g. if you have multiple notes open in split panes)
ast.target: 在光标未所在的笔记/编辑器中如何淡化段落/句子（例如在分割窗格中打开多个笔记时）

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The amount of lines to always keep above and below the current line
ast.target: 始终保留在当前行上方和下方的行数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of characters per line

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positions the typewriter line at the specified percentage of the screen
ast.target: 将打字机行定位在屏幕的指定百分比位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom font size in points for writing focus mode (0 = use default font size)
ast.target: 写作专注模式的自定义字号（单位：点）（0 = 使用默认字号）

ast.name: setDesc
